preflight.head: 60a73a7
preflight.dirty_files_note: daemon runtime files dirty (expected); not staged

phase1_p26i_handoff_verified.p26i_conclusion: P26H was premature; analysis 4.1h before window; daemon running at 03:09Z

explanation: P26J post-window pair verification cannot proceed until the closing window (07:00Z–09:00Z) has elapsed AND additional time (10 min buffer) has passed for daemon to complete final cycle. Current UTC is 03:20Z — 3.65h before the window opens. No analysis, no code changes, no daemon restarts performed. This artifact serves as a readiness checkpoint confirming P26J is correctly positioned with P26I handoff verified.
continuation_note: Re-run P26J after 09:10Z UTC (Taiwan 17:10). At that time: full Phase 2–5 analysis of tsl_odds_history.jsonl, daemon heartbeat, coverage recheck. Expected: COMPLETE_PAIR=222 if daemon ran; COMPLETE_PAIR=220 if daemon stopped.
